case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. JORGE A RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT HAS BEEN RECORDED AS FOLLOWS: SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY -- 03/17/03 -- INSTRUMENT NUMBER: 13450733 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JORGE A
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JORGE A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
